programme.title: Petticoat Junction S07E11
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S07E11

programme.title: Munsters 210
programme.desc: Munsters 210

programme.title: Addams Family 118
programme.desc: Addams Family 118

programme.title: Love Boat 124
programme.desc: Love Boat 124

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: The Emir of Asambanas prize cheetah is sick and may not be able to race in an important contest with a rival tribe The Emir threatens to cut off the Wamera reserve from using the water on his property unless Dr Tracy cures his cheetah in time for the race

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeway is chosen to star in a new dog food ad campaign but the creator has a secret ingredient and will kill to hide it

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: While Mary Beth recovers from breast surgery and mulls retirement Chris has her prized Corvette stolen but it may provide her a leg up on the sergeants exam Meanwhile an informant is murdered leaving Chris to find out the who and why

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch go undercover as Rafferty and OBrien Texas-based dealers looking to make a five-kilo heroin buy from drug kingpin Danner Assisting them is Cheryl a wide-eyed country girl and one of Danners reluctant drug mules

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When a weapon built by the Firm is stolen One of the men who stole it thinking the man who hired him is shortchanging him calls the Firm and arranges a meeting Michael sends Hawke and his people because the meeting is taking place at a Wild West Show When they get there the man who called them makes contact but before he could tell them anything is killed Hawke turns to the woman in charge for help

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A family of militia types is being hunted by a demon

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: An excited Uncle Joe comes bearing news Kates first boyfriend Walter OConnor who is now a major league baseball manager is coming to stay at the Shady Rest Uncle Joes excitement is primarily for Betty Jo as he sees her as a potential major leaguer a stronger prospect if Walter has indeed come back to court Kate As Uncle Joe and girls contemplate a rekindling of their mother and Walters romance a nervous Kate doesnt want to presuppose anything about Walters visit While Kate is excited to see Walter she is still just as anxious and nervous about him actually asking her to marry him Regardless of Walters intentions his presence alone makes Sam come to the realization that he too has feelings for Kate which may complicate things for her

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Its the Christmas season and those at the Shady Rest among others are decorating the Cannonball in preparation for their annual caroling and gift delivery runs Their plans are placed into jeopardy with the arrival of Homer Bedloe who states that what they are doing is against railroad policy As such he wont allow it Since its the Christmas season Kate hopes that Bedloe will have some heart and she tries to use her best Christmas spirit in treating Bedloe with kindness to change his mind Only one person may be able to make Bedloe change his mind but not without some bah-humbug grumbling from Bedloe

programme.title: TBH 214
programme.desc: TBH 214

programme.title: TBH 128
programme.desc: TBH 128

programme.title: Munsters 217
programme.desc: Munsters 217

programme.title: Munsters 223
programme.desc: Munsters 223

programme.title: Addams Family 105
programme.desc: Addams Family 105

programme.title: Addams 208
programme.desc: Addams 208

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E36

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E13
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E13

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: As the second witness of a murder Lucas is asked to travel to another town to testify at the accused mans trial The catch is the only other witness has been murdered and his killer has not been identified

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain is surprised when someone he once worked with Sam Morley shows up at the ranch Lucas thought Morley had died but it turns out hes a wanted man and wants Lucas to do him a favor turn him in for the 500 reward money thats available Morley desperately needs the money so his girlfriend Beth Landis can get treatment for a serious disease Lucas thinks hes on the level and decides to go along Unfortunately another cowpoke who once worked with them Hamp Ferris rides into town and is looking to collect the bounty on Morley himself

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E22 The Gallows
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E22 The Gallows

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Jannette asks Nick for help in investigating the murder of a friend which leads Nick into the bizarre world of prostitution

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan are transported to 1875 London where aided by an adventurous young writer they set out to reclaim a cursed object from a bloodthirsty killer

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Fredy 112
programme.desc: Fredy 112

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans 303
programme.desc: Hogans 303

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton devises a deceitful plan to have McHale chosen for the position of Liaison Officer at British Fleet HQ in Australia Parker and The Crew unwittingly help McHale to get the job then must scheme to get him off the hook when they find out that they wont be going along

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: With McHale and his Crew presumably killed in action publicity-hungry Binghamton plays the part of the grieving Commanding Officer when a War Correspondent comes to Taratupa looking for a big story But when McHale and the Crew turn up very much alive and well Binghamton must cooperate with McHale to work up a cover story

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Inept Max poses as a safe cracker so the Chief orders all federal bank vaults left open

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Bobs second wife Lee tries to win his daughters acceptance; Gophers dad feels left out when he and mother Ros board for a Mothers Day cruise Older woman Maggie with grown kids worries what husband Mac will say about her pregnancy

programme.title: WKRP 218
programme.desc: WKRP 218

programme.title: WKRP 211
programme.desc: WKRP 211

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Nickys former boyfriend Danny a musician with a history of drug dependency reappears in San Francisco to play a gig at a local club He tries to rekindle their relationship and also asks Nicky for financial help because he owes money to some thugs in Los Angeles

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Avas obsessing over the baby shower reaches a fever pitch

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Victor Durand once ran a bogus clinic before Dan sent him to prison Now Durand takes revenge by stealing a toxin infecting Dan with it and taunting him while Dan and his doctors frantically search for a cure to keep Dan alive

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts want to give their charity committee gourmet chocolate hearts as a thank-you but when one turns out to have been part of a smuggling operation can Jonathan and Jennifer figure out what is going on before someone tries the special chocolates from an unknown admirer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: An old beau of Stephanies arrives at the Stratford with his new fiancée in tow--Stephanies best friend from high school

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George joins the volunteer fire department

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After a bat bites Gilligan in the neck in a cave he is convinced that he will become a vampire and moves away to save his fellow castaways

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan head out in the ocean to a oil rig abandoned after a strange accident and find a drifting yacht with a terrified young woman aboard who says that her yacht captain was pulled off the ship by a gelatinous green sea monster which in fact was the result of the oil rig accident

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A distortion in time produces two separate moons with two separate Alphas from different eras

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes efforts to reform old-time moonshiner Hard Luck Jones runs into plenty of roadblocks when he hijacks a tank to use as a rolling brewery Bo and Luke have to convince Jones to stop his illegal activities before they wind up in federal prison

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Doors makes a public appearance leading to an increase in anti-Taelon sentiment The Taelon Synod is fed up with Daan and sends Zoor in his stead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A habitually lying little girl falsely accuses Kimble of chasing her through the woods and it puts his life in greater danger

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An outlaw gang leader orders his men to kidnap a teacher so he can learn to read and write for a special purpose His men nab Victoria by mistake-she pretends to be the school marm to buy time for the Barkley boys to find her

programme.title: Chey 508
programme.desc: Chey 508

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After one of his fellow teachers is killed on the schoolyard during a fight between two students a veteran former teacher kidnaps four troublesome students and holds them in an abandoned private school where he chains them while he forces them to read history lessons

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Fire Birds
programme.desc: Elite Apache helicopter pilots are tasked with destroying powerful armed drug cartels operating in South America

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.

programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure
